news.t: Solving Reinvestment Risk With Distributing Ladder ETFs
Beat Tuition Costs With Tax-Exempt Bond Ladders
Northern Trust Launches Fixed Income ETF Suites

overview.description: The Northern Trust 2035 Tax-Exempt Distributing Ladder ETF (MUNB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund seeks to provide regular cash distributions consisting of tax-exempt income and/or principal through an actively managed, laddered portfolio of US investment grade municipal bonds with various maturity dates through the year 2035. MUNB was launched on Aug 18, 2025 and is issued by Northern Trust.
